jaxlibxc
  • API Reference
  • Registry
  • View page source

Registry

Functions for looking up and listing available functionals.

Global registry mapping functional names/IDs to their definitions.

jaxlibxc._registry.register(func_def)[source]

Register a functional definition (primitive or mixed).

jaxlibxc._registry.get(name_or_id)[source]

Look up a functional by name (str) or ID (int).

jaxlibxc._registry.available()[source]

Return sorted list of all registered functional names.
